description_long: This object is a modern flat-screen computer monitor with a wide rectangular display and a sleek, minimalist design. The front features a large, glossy screen bordered by a matte black bezel of moderate thickness, providing a clean and professional appearance. The monitor is supported by a sturdy, flat rectangular base connected to a solid central stand, which appears to be made of plastic or metal with a matte finish. The rear of the monitor is plain, with no visible ports, buttons, or branding, emphasizing its streamlined look. The side views reveal the monitor's slim profile and the angular connection between the screen and the stand. The overall construction suggests durability and stability, suitable for use in offices, homes, or public urban environments.
description: A sleek, modern flat-screen computer monitor with a wide display, matte black bezel, and a sturdy rectangular base. The design is minimalist and professional, with a slim profile and no visible branding or ports.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large glossy screen, matte black bezel, and the full width of the rectangular base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the monitor's slim profile and the angular connection between the screen and the central stand.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, unadorned back panel with the central stand and wide base visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the thinness of the monitor and the solid support of the stand.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is matte black, moderately thick, with sharp corners and a smooth, untextured finish. It frames the display area evenly on all sides and lacks decorative elements or color contrast.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a flat, rectangular pedestal base with a solid, vertical central support. It appears to be made of matte black plastic or metal and does not show visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any side of the monitor.
